mapper.select:
SELECT 废物类别编号 AS categoryId, 废物类别 AS categoryCode, 废物类别名称 AS categoryName, 限额 AS wasteLimit, 限额开始时间 AS limitStartDate, 限额结束时间 AS limitEndDate FROM HAZARDOUS_WASTE_CATEGORY
WHERE 废物类别 IN
#{cat}
ORDER BY CASE WHEN 限额 IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, -- 无限额排在后面 限额 ASC, 废物类别 ASC

SELECT hwc.废物类别 AS categoryCode, SUM(cw.计划转移数量) AS planned FROM HAZARDOUS_WASTE_CATEGORY hwc LEFT JOIN HAZARDOUS_WASTE_ITEM hwi ON hwi.废物类别编号 = hwc.废物类别编号 LEFT JOIN CONTRACT_WASTE_ITEM cw ON cw.危废条目编号 = hwi.条目编号 LEFT JOIN CONTRACT_ITEM ci ON ci.合同条目编号 = cw.合同条目编号 LEFT JOIN CONTRACT c ON c.合同编号 = ci.合同编号 WHERE c.合同状态 IN ('已通过', '执行中', '已完结', '已归档') AND c.签订时间 IS NOT NULL AND DATE(c.签订时间) >= STR_TO_DATE(#{startDate}, '%Y-%m-%d') AND DATE(c.签订时间) <= STR_TO_DATE(#{endDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND hwc.废物类别 IN
#{cat}
GROUP BY hwc.废物类别

SELECT hwc.废物类别 AS categoryCode, SUM(wi.实际收运数量) AS actual FROM HAZARDOUS_WASTE_CATEGORY hwc LEFT JOIN HAZARDOUS_WASTE_ITEM hwi ON hwi.废物类别编号 = hwc.废物类别编号 LEFT JOIN WAREHOUSING_WASTE_ITEM wi ON wi.危废条目编号 = hwi.条目编号 WHERE wi.实际入库日期 IS NOT NULL AND DATE(wi.实际入库日期) >= STR_TO_DATE(#{startDate}, '%Y-%m-%d') AND DATE(wi.实际入库日期) <= STR_TO_DATE(#{endDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND hwc.废物类别 IN
#{cat}
GROUP BY hwc.废物类别

SELECT hwc.废物类别 AS categoryCode, SUM(tmi.确认数量) AS manifest FROM HAZARDOUS_WASTE_CATEGORY hwc LEFT JOIN HAZARDOUS_WASTE_ITEM hwi ON hwi.废物类别编号 = hwc.废物类别编号 LEFT JOIN TRANSFER_MANIFEST_ITEM tmi ON tmi.废物类别 = hwc.废物类别 WHERE tmi.是否删除 = 0 AND tmi.创建时间 IS NOT NULL AND DATE(tmi.创建时间) >= STR_TO_DATE(#{startDate}, '%Y-%m-%d') AND DATE(tmi.创建时间) <= STR_TO_DATE(#{endDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND hwc.废物类别 IN
#{cat}
GROUP BY hwc.废物类别
